name: LanzaTech Global, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Founded in 2005 in New Zealand and now headquartered in Skokie, Illinois, LanzaTech is a leading provider of carbon management and advanced conversion technologies, focused on transforming waste materials into high-value fuels, chemicals, and critical inputs for industry. Our mission is to drive energy resilience, industrial competitiveness, and supply chain security by leveraging robust, scalable biotechnology solutions to maximize the value of domestic resources.
